response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrable background in network switch security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X; their experience is predominantly in web/mobile stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) with no evidence of embedded firmware or network security domain expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Experience with Linux systems and DevOps infrastructure setup
concerns: No proven C programming experience in UNIX embedded environments
Lacks native Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement
No exposure to LAN-switch security protocols, kernel analysis, or embedded networking
